Home → Discography → Ruthless

Ruthless

2008 · Siccness.net

Bizzy Bone’s first solo album released through Siccness.net, named after the legendary label that launched Bone Thugs-N-Harmony's career. Features guest appearances from Rick Ross and Pitbull. The entire album was recorded in Nick Cannon‘s studio “Can I Ball”. Material from these recording sessions would later be reused on other releases from the same label. Siccness.net also released a DVD including videos for nine of the album's tracks.

"And whether I'm right or wrong, slightly still tipsy, Gypsies in titan songs."

— Ready 4 War
01 Intro (Layzie Dedication) produced by Cricet ▷
02 That's How produced by Cricet feat. Pitbull ▷
03 It's 19 99 produced by Batkave ▷
04 Fuck Da World produced by Cricet ▷
05 Gangsta produced by Dave Moss ▷
06 Get Bizzy produced by Cricet ▷
07 Hoodtails produced by Dave Moss feat. Rick Ross ▷
08 Ready 4 War produced by Batkave ▷
09 Get High produced by Cricet ▷
10 Uptown Downtown produced by Steve Vicious ▷
11 4 Da Ladies produced by Dave Moss ▷
12 Rollercoaster produced by Steve Vicious feat. Layzie Bone ▷
